transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for calling Sunrise Recovery Center, this is Erin. What can I help you with?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Hi. I'm Sophia. I'm calling because I've been struggling with cocaine use and my family is really worried about me. I'm worried about me too.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand. How long has this been going on?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: About two years. It's daily now.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay. We have a really great program here and I can tell you — our 30-day program gets people better. You'll come out of here a completely different person.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: That sounds good. That's what I need.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Absolutely. Do you have insurance?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Yes, CoreFirst Insurance.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Member ID and group number?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Member ID BP61519698, group GRP-932514.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great. And have you had any previous treatment?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: I did a 30-day residential about three years ago.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: And you're back to using — okay. Well this time will be different, I promise. Our program has an excellent success rate.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: I hope so. I'm ready to commit.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: That's what we need to hear. Is there anything about cost you're worried about?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: A little. I don't know what insurance covers.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: We'll verify your benefits and let you know. Don't worry, we'll get you taken care of.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Okay. What happens next?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Someone from our admissions team will call you. Probably in the next day or so.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Do you have a more specific time?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I'll put you on the list. You'll hear from us.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Okay. Thank you.

gold_labels.coaching_notes: COMPLIANCE VIOLATION: 'our 30-day program gets people better' and 'You'll come out of here a completely different person' are outcome guarantees. Also: 'this time will be different, I promise' and 'excellent success rate' reinforce the violation. Clinical screen shallow — did not explore severity, withdrawal risk, or co-occurring issues. Next step vague.
